/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/minigzip64.dir/test/minigzip.o -o /home/lf_mezenner_udst_edu_qa/secure-parallel-training/HE-SecureNet/thirdparty/Gemini-SEAL/bin/minigzip64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lf_mezenner_udst_edu_qa/secure-parallel-training/HE-SecureNet/thirdparty/Gemini-SEAL/lib /home/lf_mezenner_udst_edu_qa/secure-parallel-training/HE-SecureNet/thirdparty/Gemini-SEAL/lib/libz.so.1.2.11
